{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319560943F6AB8E5060FBBDFEA1"}"},"total":4565},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7588038583574856472","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还有人物的塑造也很好啊！苏芸从开始的懦弱到能够杀人不眨眼，黑衣军的步步成长，徐眠抱大腿的能力，大家之间相处的感觉真的像老父亲单身带娃似的，很温馨！要抱大腿就好好抱！不要多想！
毕竟是他们都是从和平时代进入大楼的，想要他们一开始就杀人如麻，怕不是那个世界的80亿人都是杀人犯吧，否则那不可能让人一下子就能对同类下刀子的啊，能转变心态一步步成长就不错了
反正我就是喜欢无脑爽，这本书对我来说没什么多大的毒点，也有爽点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766733651,"group_id":"7471788218946423832","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101413455977"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471788218946423832","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"701"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":156619,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7588037079529538328","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看啊！就是一种无脑爽的感觉，千哥与监管们，黑衣军，邪魔老哥和其他什么物种间的相处真的是很棒啊！超喜欢看的，可是也导致我三天看完了六百章，没书看了！！！
黑衣军真是一群邪教徒，真喜欢！桀桀桀桀！！！
监管们各有各的喜好，蛇哥喜欢音乐，木偶前辈喜欢绘画，鱼哥喜欢调制毒药，每个监管者真的都好有特点，而且经历了长久孤寂，一成不变的生活后，林老板的出现真的是给了他们生活的乐趣，心酸
邪魔老哥嘁嘁嘁的真的很特别啊，逗小孩似的逗千哥真有趣
希望大家都会有一个完满，不后悔的结局"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766733056,"group_id":"7471788218946423832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想看攻床弱，受脐橙🥹🥹🥹","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9UUcvgxp1vdmQWofq4pmg8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/13476f4dcf0e49a39e0fc87cb2a1b743~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789028&x-signature=bly0Cs3Pt61HBYBp7e0XPKwIy8c%3D","user_id":"101413455977","user_name":"赠酒予卿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101413455977","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471788218946423832","book_info":{"abstract":"【不清图你求什么生？】
【我身为监管者，利用职权便利卡点bug没毛病吧？】
【你跟我同事说去吧！】
　　全民穿越，林千成为无限大楼中求生者的一员。
　　在这里，每扇门后都是一个未知的新世界。
　　其他人还在犹豫着不敢出门，林千就已经因为一场赌局成为了监管者。
　　【一级监管者薪资：每日获得一点自由属性】
　　“嗯？”
　　“如果是这样的话，那同事丑就丑点儿吧，只要不吃我就行。”
　　丧尸危机，诡异复苏，赛博朋克，没人知道门后到底会是什么。
　　清理任务，生存任务，区域试炼。
　　无论用什么方法，想要活下去就只有变强一条路。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b715a692410e70f7ba9f76b5e861dc31","author":"我已经换三个名了","author_id":"","book_id":"7471788218946423832","book_name":"求生？你一个监管者求什么生？","book_short_name":"无限：监管者","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471788232347222552","read_count":"196719","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1982192"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"958","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,穿越,无限流,灵异,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f3d01a6415723dbc6d307766c642bedf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450969&x-signature=qgM2XkWEFa8uMDT0UGAJRmU%2BOnY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1286841935861790","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"701"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319560943F6AB8E5060FBBDFEA1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwar ded_count":0,"listen_duration":29728,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":62892,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":47613},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7514489345753219864","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书看的挺爽的，主要是主角一直很强，没有憋屈也没有装弱小，苟文看多了可以看这个。
      主角身边的属下特别有眼力见也很聪明很上道，知道自己跟着谁才能很长远，没有很蠢的属下。
      然后主角也承认自己不聪明，没有硬凹聪明人设，很清晰自己的定位是一个战力值高的老大，一些自己搞不懂的会安排给智力高的属下，不会乱做决定。
      就是不知道是不是无女主[探究]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749609110,"group_id":"7471788218946423832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看小说的无聊少女<♡.>","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1WD1y4tTRexZ6dRVuKCaI78NFHzCS1VLcbW3HbBnMp/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/041a67749f014cd3815b2e141cc16f9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794703&x-signature=3xtC4tRw5QU6SiaXwMmlIpURmYE%3D","user_id":"3315735756807591","user_name":"谢小肆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3315735756807591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965743,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471788218946423832","book_info":{"abstract":"【不清图你求什么生？】
